description: Delve into the spirit of generosity with our specialized email template designed for fundraisers, non-profits, and Giving Tuesday initiatives. This template is perfect for organizations seeking to inspire and encourage their community to participate in charitable activities and donations. With its inviting design and compelling narrative, it effortlessly communicates the importance of giving, particularly during the holiday season. This template is a powerful tool for fundraising campaigns, making it easier to connect with potential donors and drive your cause forward. It's not just an email; it's an impactful message that resonates with the spirit of Giving Tuesday and the essence of non-profit work. Elevate your fundraising efforts with this dynamic, emotionally engaging email template.
short_description: Inspire generosity with our email template designed for fundraisers and non-profits. Perfect for Giving Tuesday initiatives, it encourages community participation in charitable activities. This compelling template drives your cause forward, resonating with the spirit of giving. Elevate your fundraising efforts today.

designer.description: I am a graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and photography. Currently working freelance and open for new work!

html_data:
About

Contact

Donate

It's the Season of Giving

Giving Tuesday is a movement that unleashes the power of radical generosity around the world. It was created to help the “giving season” get started, reminding people that there is more to holidays than consumerism and commercialization. Giving Tuesday reimagines a world built upon shared humanity and generosity.

Learn More
 

HOW IT WORKS

Helping Together!

On Tuesday after the Thanksgiving Weekend, all our sales will be donated to Giving Tuesday to support their cause. Let's make a change together!

 

We've almost reached our goal!

Donations on Giving Tuesday 2020. Equivalent to almost £14,000 a minute and a 43% increase from Giving Tuesday 2019 (Visa UK data)

 
Shop and Donate
 
 

How Giving Tuesday helps

Want to find another way to help! Get to know Giving Tuesday and find the best way you can share and give.

Donations help those in need and feed those who are hungry

Show gratitude to essential workers

Volunteer, even virtually!

Visit Their Site
 
 

Stay up-to-date with current activities and future events by following us on your favorite social media channels.

Changed your mind? Unsubscribe
